{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/138989039?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/AndyAnh174", "id": 138989039, "login": "AndyAnh174", "node_id": "U_kgDOCEjN7w", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/AndyAnh174", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47380", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-208", "name": "Observable Timing Discrepancy"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-307", "name": "Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts"}], "description": "### Summary
Sign-in response timing differed between known and unknown email addresses because
the unknown-user branch returned without performing a password hash comparison.

### Details
The unknown-user branch in `auth.service.ts` now performs a `bcrypt.compare` against
a fixed dummy hash so the response time of failed sign-ins is approximately
independent of whether the address exists. Rate limiting on the sign-in endpoint is
implemented in the Enterprise build only and is not affected by this advisory.

### Impact
A network-positioned attacker could enumerate registered email addresses by timing
sign-in responses. Exploitation requires only the ability to send unauthenticated
sign-in requests.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@AndyAnh174](https://github.com/AndyAnh174).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00197, "percentile": 0.09554}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47380"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.04.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: User Enumeration via Sign-In Timing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr54-jwhj-55gp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.04.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.04.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: NocoDB: User Enumeration via Sign-In Timing
